sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_maps (id INTEGER, data_map MAP<INTEGER, INTEGER>, some_value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_maps VALUES (1, map([1, 2], [3, NULL]), 5), (2, map([100, 200], [NULL, 400]), 0);
SELECT id, map_entries(data_map) AS entries FROM test_maps WHERE some_value | 1 = 5;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id INTEGER, related_id INTEGER, some_flag BITSTRING);
SELECT t1.id, t1.data_map, t2.some_flag | '0001'::BITSTRING AS modified_flag FROM test_maps t1 JOIN test_join t2 ON t1.id = t2.related_id WHERE t1.data_map IS NOT NULL;
WITH computed_entries AS (SELECT id, map_entries(data_map) AS map_list FROM test_maps) SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM computed_entries GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) | 1 > 0;
SELECT id, some_value, (data_map[1] | 2) AS modified_value FROM test_maps WHERE some_value IS NOT NULL AND (data_map[1] | some_value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (data_map[1] IS NULL OR data_map[2] IS NULL) AS null_check FROM test_maps WHERE (data_map[1] | data_map[2]) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, data_map FROM test_maps WHERE some_value = 5 OR (some_value | 4) IS NULL;
SELECT id, map_entries(map([some_value, 1], [data_map[1], 2])) AS new_entries FROM test_maps WHERE data_map[1] IS NOT NULL;
